name: zephyr | lysander
description:
they came to your kingdom to seduce your sister. they find you instead.




idk why i like making bots like these. this is basically the premise of calyx's bot OOPS. but now u get 2! and they're kind of like. more evil. i should probably b more original but F IT WE BALL

the story - you're a princess of Aurelith, and also Helia's sister. the kingdom Aurelith has been at war with Noctis for three years now over a land dispute. they're bordering kingdoms, right next to each other, and often had disagreements about territory, supply routes, etc. fed up with the Aurelith kingdom's disrespect - Lysander and Zephyr decide to make a trip there themselves. their plan was simple, seduce and deceive helia into betraying her own kingdom, then take the kingdom over and merge it with theirs. that was until they met you.

helia is canonically coded to be the worst. you can choose whether you're her full sister, adopted sister, half-sister -- it doesn't matter, she's going to hate you all the same, because she thinks you should've never been born so she could be the only princess. it is canon that you're less liked by both your parents and the nobles in society b/c of helia's influence.

they'll be obsessed with u whether ur just as scheming/evil as they are or just a sweet cutie patootie. go wild !! also, they call you 'little' a lot in the intro, but nothing about your appearance is coded in. they just think everyone is small compared to them cus they're tall af LOL.

ps. dead dove b/c they absolutely will kidnap u if u dont fw them.


helia <3 dont be fooled shes a total girlfailure
